name: Hotel Bel Air's Tortilla Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet until hot.
2. Add tortillas and fry until crispy.
3. Add tomatoes, garlic, onions, cumin, and jalapenos.
4. Sweat (cover and cook) until tender.
5. Add chicken stock and cook for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
6. Puree the soup in a blender and strain through a sieve.
7. Add salt and pepper to desired taste.
8. Serve hot and add garnish as desired. This soup is especially delicious on a cold day and can be used as a main dish.
